content.en:
After getting rid of the tailed dragon, there is no danger in the future, and it is very calm along the way.

"Good luck!"

The Great Ancestors of the Xuanqi Pavilion and the Great Ancestors from the Hopeless Land all breathed a sigh of relief.

After all, crossing the empty galaxy, even with the help of Yinlin Kun, the danger is always there, if you are not careful, Yinlin Kun is killed, and all the great ancestors have fallen, it is also possible!

Like this one, the danger is almost negligible.

Time passed slowly, and suddenly Yinlin Kun stopped, and many Great Ancestors found that they had passed through the Voidless Galaxy and saw another territory.

"Let's all go down!"

Xuanwu Dazu ordered.

Whoa!!!

A great ancestor from the Hopeless Land was driven out of Yinlin Kun and descended to another realm.

And the great ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion all left here, and did not take away the great ancestors of the hopeless land.

After all, the mission of the Xuanqi Pavilion is to take them away from the hopeless land, and the superfluous things will not be done.

The Great Ancestors of the Hopeless Land descended here, and the road after that was to break through on their own.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, what are your plans?"

The Golden Glass Ancestor came to Ye Tian and asked.

"I don't have any plans, let's take a look first!"

Ye Tian said casually.

Jinli Great Ancestor said: "Xuanming Great Ancestor, I am going to go to the Hurricane Capital, if you want to find me in the future, you can go to the Hurricane Capital!"

With that, the Golden Glass Ancestor took his leave.

"Hurricane Capital!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about this place, in fact, he didn't know much about the territory outside the Hopeless Land, like the Golden Glass Great Ancestor, they were afraid that they had already learned something about the situation outside the Hopeless Land, so they had a plan for the future in their hearts.

Swish!

Ye Tian also left here, and then walked around.

In the following days, Ye Tian traveled a lot of places and learned a lot about here.

The area he is in now is called the Hurricane Collar, and the Hurricane Capital is the core megacity of the Hurricane Collar, and it is also the most prosperous place in the Hurricane Territory.

When Ye Tian learned about the situation of the Hurricane Collar, he had to admit that the Hurricane Collar was too powerful.

In the Hurricane Territory, there are dozens of high-level immeasurable lifeforms alone, and there are even more mid-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"I'll go to the Hurricane Capital too, in the Hurricane Territory, only the Hurricane Capital can get the recipe for Life Reforge!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Hurricane Capital.

Ye Tian came here, but he didn't go to the Golden Glass Ancestor.

Hurricane Pavilion.

This is the first force of the Hurricane Lord, and it is also the master of the Hurricane Lord, and half of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Hurricane Leader come from the Hurricane Pavilion.

And Hurricane Pavilion is a force that does business, doing anything.

After Ye Tian entered the Hurricane Pavilion, he asked, "Do you Hurricane Pavilion sell the Life Reforge Formula?"

One of the Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Pavilion shook his head and said, "This Great Ancestor, how precious the formula is, let alone our Hurricane Pavilion, no force will sell it." If you don't join other forces, you can choose to join our Hurricane Pavilion, as long as you serve our Hurricane Pavilion for a long time, you can hope to obtain the resources of life recasting, but the formula can never be given!"

"Oh, so do you sell the resources for Life Reforge?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"It's not for sale, but the Hurricane Pavilion will hold auctions every once in a while, and there will be an auction of this kind of resource when the time comes!" said the Great Ancestor of the Hurricane Pavilion.

Ye Tian didn't stay long and left directly.

"Sure enough, it's impossible to buy the formula, not even the resources, these forces control the formula and resources, and it is impossible for ordinary Great Ancestors to impact the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms!" Ye Tian said darkly.

And those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms from the Hopeless Land, even if they entered the Hurricane Territory, they could only choose to join the Hurricane Pavilion or a few other forces with formulas, and serve for countless years, before they could hope to obtain this resource.

But even so, their hope of breaking through to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform was still very small.

In the following days, Ye Tian stayed in the hurricane capital.

According to his understanding, there are only three forces in the Hurricane Territory that have the formula, and the three forces of the Hurricane Pavilion, the Sea Sacred Mountain, and the Demon Sect have the complete formula, and there is more than one formula.

And these three forces, no matter which one of them, will not easily give resources, no matter how high the talent is, it is useless.

Because there are so many resources, if you want to get the resources to reforge your life, you have to wait slowly.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not choose to join these three forces.

"If you have the recipe, it's different!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Recipes are also created, so he also hopes to create recipes.

It is possible to create a complete formula, which is perfected one by one at the cost of the lives of countless Great Ancestors, and it is almost unrealistic for a single Great Ancestor to create a formula by himself.

......

Onidu Mountain.

This is a special plane in the Hurricane Capital, where any item can be traded, even some forbidden items, as long as there is a different silver sand.

Even the three forces of the Hurricane Collar can't manage this place, because there is a more powerful force behind the Guidu Mountain, but that force is not in the Hurricane Collar.

this day.

Ye Tian bought a ticket to enter the Ghost Capital Mountain, and then came in.

Soon, he entered an attic in the Onidu Mountain.

This attic is very famous in Guidu Mountain, called the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and the origin behind it is very large, so it dares to sell anything.

Ye Tiandi heard about the existence of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion and came here.

As soon as he entered the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, Ye Tian saw a woman, this woman was a mid-level immeasurable lifeform of the Blood Ghost Clan, her strength was not weak, and it was estimated that she had also reached the limit of a middle-level immeasurable lifeform.

"I want to buy something!"

Ye Tian said.

"What did this Great Ancestor buy?" the woman smiled.

"Recipe!"

Ye Tian said simply.

As soon as she heard the formula, the woman's expression changed, "We don't have a complete formula in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion!"

"I want a broken formula!"

Ye Tian said.

"Broken formula, that's there!" the woman immediately laughed.

The complete formula refers to the formula without any aftermath, and the incomplete formula is different, although it is also a formula created by the strong, but it has huge flaws, although the formula can be used to refine some resources for life recasting, but the sequelae are too great.

In the end, these formulas could only allow the Great Ancestors to carry out four or five life reforges, and it was impossible for a mid-level immeasurable lifeform to complete nine reforges and step into the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

But even so, a few more life reforges will increase the strength a bit, so the value of these broken formulas is still very high, and they are not easy to buy.

Because it is not allowed to sell the mutilated formula, but the Crippled Heaven Pavilion has a deep background, so no force dares to control them.
